content:
Post 1

Tech rallied, materials collapsed — the ASX 200 couldn't split the difference. Index closed at 8,803.90, down 0.31%, slipping below its 20-day MA with Materials off 2.64% doing most of the damage. #ASX #ausbiz

Post 2

📈 IT +2.01%, Financials +1.25% holding the line. 📉 Materials -2.64%, A-REITs -1.34%, Energy -1.28% dragging. Two very different markets trading on the same exchange today. #ASX #materials #ausbiz

Post 3

NWL surged 6.73% to AUD 24.43 — Netwealth leading the IT charge as rate-cut optimism lifts wealth platforms. WiseTech added 5.66%. Growth tech finding buyers while miners get sold. #ASX #fintech #ausbiz

Post 4

🪙 Gold at AUD 5,958.82/oz with AUD/USD at 0.6938. Elevated gold in local terms yet Lynas fell 6.37% and Deep Yellow dropped 6.87% — commodity stocks decoupling from metal prices. #ASX #gold #mining

Post 5

ASX sits 4.34% off its 52-week high. Materials need a floor. Watch whether gold holds AUD 5,958/oz and if lithium names like LTR stabilise after today's 7.55% drop. Bull or bear on miners this week? #ASX #lithium #ausbiz
